---
title: "Clustering the BioTrove Dataset"
author:
  - name: Chris Endemann
    email: endemann@wisc.edu

date: 2025-09-11
date-format: long
image: "../../images/Clustering-Biotrove.jpg"

categories:
  - Projects
  - ML Marathon
  - MLM25
  - Computer vision
  - Clustering
  - Unsupervised learning
  - Biodiversity
  - Image data
  - Deep learning
  - CLIP

---

Clustering the BioTrove Dataset was featured in the [2025 Machine Learning Marathon (MLM25)](https://ml-marathon.wisc.edu/). This challenge asks participants to discover genus- and species-level structure in biodiversity images using unsupervised and self-supervised learning methods.

### Challenge design
- **Task**: Cluster biodiversity images to recover taxonomic structure (genus and species groupings) without explicit labels.
- **Domain**: Biodiversity and ecology -- automated species identification can support pest control, crop monitoring, biodiversity assessment, and environmental conservation.
- **Data**: Images drawn from [BioTrove](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Data/BioTrove.html), the largest publicly accessible biodiversity image dataset (161.9 million images, ~366K species), curated from iNaturalist with research-grade annotations.
- **Methods**: Contrastive learning, autoencoders, CLIP-based embeddings, and other unsupervised/semi-supervised approaches.

### Links
- **Kaggle challenge**: [Clustering the BioTrove Dataset](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/biotrove-clustering/overview)
- **Winning writeup**: [1st place: It All Depends on a Good Embedding](https://www.kaggle.com/competitions/biotrove-clustering/writeups/1-it-all-depends-on-a-good-embedding)
- **BioTrove project**: [baskargroup.github.io/BioTrove](https://baskargroup.github.io/BioTrove/)

## Related resources
- [**Data**: BioTrove](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Data/BioTrove.html): Learn more about the BioTrove dataset, including its construction from iNaturalist and available CLIP embeddings.
- [**Data**: iNaturalist](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Data/iNaturalist.html): The citizen-science platform underlying BioTrove's research-grade biodiversity observations.
- [**Library**: Hugging Face](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Libraries/HuggingFace.html): BioTrove-CLIP models and the dataset are hosted on Hugging Face.
- [**Workshop**: Intro to Deep Learning with PyTorch](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/Workshops/Intro-Deeplearning_PyTorch.html): Build foundational deep learning skills relevant to contrastive learning and embedding-based clustering.
- **Paper**: [BioTrove: A Large Curated Image Dataset Enabling AI for Biodiversity (NeurIPS 2024)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.17720)

## Comments
